actionCalls.name: Log_Debug_Creating_Appointment_API_failed
actionCalls.label: Log - Debug - Creating Appointment API failed

actionCalls.name: Log_Debug_No_Practice_Group_Id
actionCalls.label: Log - Debug - No Practice Group Id

actionCalls.name: Log_Debug_No_Profile_Id_Text_String
actionCalls.label: Log - Debug - No Profile Id - Text String

value.stringValue: No Profile Id Set on the Product. Unable to Create Appointment.

actionCalls.name: Log_Debug_Update_Appointment_API_failed
actionCalls.label: Log - Debug - Update Appointment API failed

value.stringValue: The API call to the EHR Appointment was successfully

actionCalls.name: Log_Debug_What_Products_are_Synced
actionCalls.label: Log - Debug - What Products are Synced

actionCalls.name: Log_Error_Error_making_API_call_for_Creating_Appointment
actionCalls.label: Log - Error - Error making API call for Creating Appointment

value.stringValue: Errored Making API Call - Create Appointment

actionCalls.name: Log_Error_Error_making_API_call_for_Updating_Appointment
actionCalls.label: Log - Error - Error making API call for Updating Appointment

value.stringValue: Errored Making API Call - Update Appointment

actionCalls.name: Log_Error_Error_Updating_Appointment_Record
actionCalls.label: Log - Error - Error Updating Appointment Record

actionCalls.name: Log_Info_Another_Sync_In_Progress
actionCalls.label: Log - Info - Another Sync In Progress

value.stringValue: Not Syned to DrChrono because there is not a DrChrono Id set on the Provider Account.

assignments.name: Set_Error_No_Practice_Group_Id
assignments.label: Set Error - No Practice Group Id

value.stringValue: Not Syned to DrChrono because there is not a Practice Group Id set on the Provider Account.
Not Syned to DrChrono because there are no products that have a Profile ID defined on the Opportunity.

assignments.name: Set_Error_Soft_Sync_In_Progress
assignments.label: Set Error - Soft - Sync In Progress

value.stringValue: Another sync is In Progress, please wait till current sync finishes.

assignments.name: Set_Flag_For_Validity_to_Create
assignments.label: Set Flag For Validity to Create

assignments.description: Here is where we will store what office was used on the Appointment.
assignments.name: Set_Office_Id_Name_on_Appointment
assignments.label: Set Office Id & Name on Appointment

assignments.description: Here is where we will store what profile was used on the Appointment.
assignments.name: Set_Profile_Id_Name_on_Appointment
assignments.label: Set Profile Id & Name on Appointment

decisions.description: We Check to Ensure that we have a Practice Group
decisions.name: Check_that_there_is_a_Practice_Group_Id
decisions.label: Check that there is a Practice Group Id

decisions.description: We want to ensure that we have a DrChrono Id before we make an API Call
decisions.name: Do_We_Have_a_Doctor_Chrono_Id
decisions.label: Do We Have a Doctor Chrono Id

decisions.description: We need to check if there is a profile id or not. If there isn't then it doesn't make sense to do an API call then a check.
decisions.name: Is_Profile_Id
decisions.label: Is There A Profile Id

decisions.name: Is_there_A_Profile_Id_Defined
decisions.label: Is there A Profile Id Defined

decisions.name: Is_There_A_Profile_Id_Defined_On_The_Product
decisions.label: Is There A Profile Id Defined On The Product

decisions.description: Here we check to see if another sync is happening. If it is then we don't want to sync again.
decisions.name: Is_There_An_Admin_Flag
decisions.label: Is There An Admin Flag

Flow.description: This will handle all creation and updates to the EHR Appointments.

formulas.description: This will determine what the EHR Status is based on the Appointment Status and Substatus field
formulas.name: form_txtEhrStatus
formulas.expression: IF( ISPICKVAL({!rec_Appointment.appointment_Status__c}, "Scheduled"), TEXT({!rec_Appointment.Sub_Status__c}), IF( ISPICKVAL({!rec_Appointment.appointment_Status__c}, "Pending Reschedule"), CASE( TEXT({!rec_Appointment.Sub_Status__c}), "Rescheduled","Rescheduled", "Patient No Show","No Show", TEXT({!rec_Appointment.appointment_Status__c}) ), TEXT({!rec_Appointment.appointment_Status__c}) ) )

Flow.label: Autolaunch - EHR Appointment

textTemplates.description: This is a simplified message for the debug path.
textTemplates.name: txt_DebugAfterProductLoop
txt_ErrorMessage_InvalidOfficeId
textTemplates.text: Not Synced to DrChrono because the Office ID set on the Providers Account, {!rec_Appointment.Provider_Account__r.Name}, is invalid. Office Id: {!rec_Appointment.Provider_Account__r.DrChrono_Default_Office_Id__c}

textTemplates.name: txt_ErrorMessage_InvalidProfileId
textTemplates.text: Not Synced to DrChrono because the Profile ID set on the product, {!txt_ProductNames}, is invalid. Profile Id: {!txt_ProfileId}

variables.description: This comes from the product configuration, whether this appointment will be a video call.
variables.name: bool_isVideoCall
